meta.title: League | PADEL2GO – The fastest-growing online padel league
meta.description: Play in the P2G League with a dynamic open ranking. Every match counts – earn points, climb the rankings and join circuit tournaments.

hero.title: Open Ranking.
hero.descPrefix: Play, earn points, climb the rankings – your results flow

points.title: Dynamic points system –
points.introPrefix: Our smart system rewards not just wins, but also
points.introSuffix: Even narrow losses earn points – every match counts!

ranking.descSuffix: – regionally or nationwide. See who your next opponents could be!
ranking.footnote: In the app you'll see real players & your current ranking

items.title: Strong community
items.description: Become part of an active player community that pushes each other and gets better together.

items.title: Live ranking
items.description: Your dynamic ranking shows your progress – every match counts and moves you up the board.

items.title: Regional & national
items.description: Compare yourself with players in your region or across the country – you decide.

items.title: Exclusive events
items.description: Access to League special events, season finals and exclusive tournaments for league players only.
